parameters.query:
WITH stale_jobs AS (
  UPDATE inbox.processing_jobs
  SET status = 'failed',
      run_after = now(),
      locked_at = NULL,
      locked_by = NULL,
      last_error = COALESCE(last_error, 'Recovered stale running job')
  WHERE status = 'running'
    AND locked_at < now() - interval '15 minutes'
  RETURNING id
),
exhausted_jobs AS (
  UPDATE inbox.processing_jobs
  SET status = 'cancelled',
      locked_at = NULL,
      locked_by = NULL,
      last_error = COALESCE(last_error, 'Maximum retry attempts reached')
  WHERE status IN ('pending', 'failed')
    AND attempts >= max_attempts
  RETURNING id
),
stale_items AS (
  UPDATE inbox.inbox_items
  SET status = 'received',
      retry_count = retry_count + 1,
      error_code = 'STALE_ANALYSIS_RECOVERED',
      error_message = 'Recovered by maintenance workflow'
  WHERE status = 'analyzing'
    AND updated_at < now() - interval '15 minutes'
    AND retry_count < 4
  RETURNING id
),
analysis_candidate AS (
  SELECT items.id
  FROM inbox.inbox_items AS items
  WHERE items.status IN ('received', 'failed')
    AND items.normalized_text IS NOT NULL
    AND items.retry_count < 4
    AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inbox.knowledge_items knowledge WHERE knowledge.inbox_item_id = items.id)
  ORDER BY items.received_at
  LIMIT 1
),
index_candidate AS (
  SELECT jobs.inbox_item_id
  FROM inbox.processing_jobs AS jobs
  WHERE jobs.job_type = 'index'
    AND jobs.status IN ('pending', 'failed')
    AND jobs.attempts < jobs.max_attempts
    AND jobs.run_after <= now()
  ORDER BY jobs.created_at
  LIMIT 1
),
owner AS (
  SELECT telegram_user_id::text AS chat_id
  FROM inbox.users
  WHERE status = 'active' AND telegram_user_id IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY created_at
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  COALESCE((SELECT id::text FROM analysis_candidate), '') AS analysis_item_id,
  COALESCE((SELECT inbox_item_id::text FROM index_candidate), '') AS index_inbox_item_id,
  COALESCE((SELECT chat_id FROM owner), '') AS alert_chat_id,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM stale_jobs) AS stale_jobs_recovered,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM stale_items) AS stale_items_recovered,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM exhausted_jobs) AS jobs_cancelled;

WITH usage AS (
  SELECT
    thresholds.id,
    thresholds.user_id,
    thresholds.storage_provider,
    thresholds.threshold_bytes,
    thresholds.current_bytes,
    thresholds.alerted_at,
    COALESCE(sum(attachments.size_bytes) FILTER (WHERE attachments.upload_status = 'stored'), 0)::bigint AS used_bytes
  FROM inbox.storage_thresholds AS thresholds
  LEFT JOIN inbox.attachments
    ON attachments.inbox_item_id IN (
      SELECT items.id FROM inbox.inbox_items AS items WHERE items.user_id = thresholds.user_id
    )
    AND attachments.storage_provider = thresholds.storage_provider
  WHERE thresholds.storage_provider = 'backblaze_b2'
  GROUP BY thresholds.id
),
crossed AS (
  UPDATE inbox.storage_thresholds AS thresholds
  SET current_bytes = usage.used_bytes,
      alerted_at = now()
  FROM usage
  WHERE thresholds.id = usage.id
    AND usage.alerted_at IS NULL
    AND usage.current_bytes < usage.threshold_bytes
    AND usage.used_bytes >= usage.threshold_bytes
  RETURNING thresholds.id, thresholds.user_id, thresholds.storage_provider, thresholds.threshold_bytes, thresholds.current_bytes, thresholds.alerted_at
),
refreshed AS (
  UPDATE inbox.storage_thresholds AS thresholds
  SET current_bytes = usage.used_bytes
  FROM usage
  WHERE thresholds.id = usage.id
    AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM crossed WHERE crossed.id = thresholds.id)
    AND thresholds.current_bytes IS DISTINCT FROM usage.used_bytes
  RETURNING thresholds.id
)
SELECT
  users.telegram_user_id::text AS chat_id,
  crossed.storage_provider,
  crossed.threshold_bytes,
  crossed.current_bytes AS used_bytes,
  crossed.alerted_at
FROM crossed
JOIN inbox.users ON users.id = crossed.user_id
CROSS JOIN (SELECT count(*) FROM refreshed) AS refresh_done
WHERE users.telegram_user_id IS NOT NULL;
